item.title: 日本企业和初创公司采用 Nvidia 开放模型来实现专业人工智能
item.summary: Japan's companies and research institutions are turning to Nvidia's Nemotron open models to build AI tailored to local language, industry, and public-sector needs. The move highlights how open, customizable systems may shape national AI strategies far beyond Japan, affecting productivity, service delivery, and data con
